findings.attack_vector: User inputs for creating and updating a todo title are not validated, potentially allowing excessively long or malicious input.
findings.mitigation: Implement input validation to ensure 'title' is within acceptable length and format, preventing potential misuse or strain on resources.

findings.attack_vector: Any user can update or delete any todo item due to missing ownership checks.
findings.mitigation: Implement authorization logic to ensure users can only modify their own todo items, enforcing proper access control.

output.summary: The security posture of the todo API is generally sound with parameterized queries protecting against SQL injection. Key areas for improvement include implementing input validation to avoid potential misuse and adding authorization checks to ensure users can only modify their own todo items. Addressing these areas will enhance the robustness of the application.
